events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario is about PEX piping installed through a slab without sleeving. This is a code compliance issue. PEX through slab typically requires sleeving or protection per IPC and manufacturer specs. This is a defective installation.

    "PEX piping penetrates concrete slab without required protective sleeve or sleeve material",
    "Unsleeved PEX through slab is vulnerable to abrasion, chemical attack, and mechanical damage from concrete/slab movement",
    "Installation does not meet IPC protection requirements or manufacturer installation specifications"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Expose affected PEX penetration and install approved sleeve/protective conduit before slab closure",
    "Verify sleeve material, length, and sealing method per manufacturer specs and IPC",
    "Re-inspect penetration after correction and document compliance"
  ],
  "rationale": "PEX passing through a concrete slab must be sleeved or otherwise protected per IPC and manufacturer specifications to prevent damage from abrasion and chemical contact with concrete. An unsleeved penetration at rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, defective condition requiring correction before closeout.",

    "IPC - protection of piping through concrete/masonry",
    "PEX manufacturer installation specifications - slab penetration sleeving requirements"
